description: Reference for the tool registry: manifest schema, built-in tool list with risk + fast-mode + dependencies, examples of registering and invoking a tool.
notes: Keep the catalogue table generated from manifests where possible to avoid drift.
steps: Sections: registry overview, manifest schema, built-in tool catalogue, custom tools (out of scope until v1.0).
Tool catalogue table: name, description, risk, fast-mode, dependencies, supported platforms.
